title: Ляпис Трубецкой - Воины света
text:
#----------------------------------PLEASE NOTE--------------------------------#
#This file is the author's own work and represents their interpretation of the#
#song. You may only use this file for private study, scholarship, or research.#
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#

Date: Thu, 5 Mar 1998 08:08:08 -0800 (PST)
From: Anthony DiMARzio 

Steppin' Out by Joe Jackson

Intro: F#maj7, Emaj7/F#, Bmaj9, F#m7, B, E, B, D/F#, E, A/C#, E

F#
Now,
E     D                             E                         F#
The mist across the window hides the lines
E     D                            E
But nothing hides the color
            C#m         D
Of the lights that shine
E      C#m      D
Electricity so fine
                   E
Look and dry your eyes

(Repeat Inro)

We
So tired of all the darkness in our lives
With no more angry words to say
Can come alive
Get into a car and drive to the other side

Chorus
F#maj7              EMaj7/F#   Bmaj9
Me babe,  steppin out
F#m7 B    E           B
In       to    the        night
D/F#    E        A/C#        E
In          to         the          light

You babe, steppin out
Into the night
Into the light

We
are young but getting old before our time
We'll leave the T.V. and the radio behind
Don't you wonder what we'll find
Steppin out tonight

(Repeat intro)

You
Can dress in pink and blue just like a child
And in a yellow taxi turn to me and smile
We'll be ther in just a while
If you follow me

(Chorus)


Chord forms
F#maj7: xx4321
Emaj7/F#: xx2444
Bmaj9: 02132x
F#m7: xx2222
B: x24442
E:022100
D:xx0232
C#m:xx2120
